title: Hot Wheels Elite 1:18 Scale
summary: This is a 1:18 scale series of Hot Wheels cars under the Hot Wheels Elite branding produced from 2006 to 2015. Most castings from 2006 to 2011 have a limited production run of between 5,000 and 10,000. Some models are part of the "Super Elite" line with a significantly reduced production run.
